pi_items.metadata_value: 75% (3 out of 4 criteria from README line 126)
pi_items.verified_value: 75% (from verifier.py line 308: passed = score >= 75; needs 3/4 criteria)
4 criteria: brightness, edge softening, glow characteristics, image modification

privileged_info_summary: The task downloads real portrait images from Unsplash with two accessible fallback URLs. GIMP's Softglow filter is located at Filters → Artistic → Softglow (not Light and Shadow as partially claimed in README). The filter has three parameters: Glow radius, Brightness, and Sharpness. Verification thresholds are: brightness increase 5-30% (documentation incorrectly states 5-20%), edge softening minimum 15%, highlight bloom 5-50% expansion, and variance reduction 5-40%. The task passes at 75% score threshold requiring at least 3 of 4 criteria met.
